_comment: Optional settings, hot-reloaded on change. monthlyBudget (USD) powers the 'This month' budget bar + burn-rate projection; null = no budget (projection still shown); override with MONTHLY_BUDGET. planMonthlyFee (USD) is your flat Max/Pro subscription fee; when set, the All-projects view shows API-equivalent usage as leverage over the fee; null = hidden; override with PLAN_MONTHLY_FEE.
